headline: Ultraviolette F77 Achieves What No Indian Motorcycle Has Done Before
summary: The Ultraviolette F77 Mach 2 has become the first Indian production motorcycle to complete a lap of the Isle of Man TT Mountain Course. The milestone gives India's performance EV industry a global proof point and pushes Ultraviolette beyond the usual commuter-EV conversation.
seo_title: Ultraviolette F77 Makes Isle of Man TT History
meta_description: Ultraviolette F77 Mach 2 becomes the first Indian production motorcycle to complete a lap of the Isle of Man TT Mountain Course.
target_keyword: Ultraviolette F77 Isle of Man TT
image_alt: Ultraviolette F77 Isle of Man TT India history thumbnail
image_credit: Featured image prepared for Car News editorial use.
facebook_post:
Big Auto Story Just Dropped!

The Ultraviolette F77 Mach 2 has done something no Indian production motorcycle had managed before: complete a lap of the legendary Isle of Man TT Mountain Course.

This is a huge moment for Indian electric motorcycle engineering, performance EVs and global ambition.

Would this make you take electric motorcycles more seriously?

Check the full story on our blog.

mainEntity.name: What did the Ultraviolette F77 achieve?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Ultraviolette F77 Mach 2 became the first Indian production motorcycle to complete a lap of the Isle of Man TT Mountain Course.

mainEntity.name: How long is the Isle of Man TT Mountain Course?

acceptedAnswer.text: The course is about 37.72 miles, or roughly 60.72 km.

mainEntity.name: Why is this important for India?

acceptedAnswer.text: It gives Indian electric motorcycle engineering a rare global performance milestone and strengthens the credibility of India's premium EV ambitions.
